entry.title: delayed payment
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,020Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 0

Summary: “Eddie had fun, but he also felt a little pampered, so he felt obligated to ask Tommy how much he owed him when they had checked in at the hotel. Tommy had sent him a little surprised look, but then he had said that it was all settled, and Eddie didn’t need to worry about a thing.So Eddie didn’t worry; how could he have expected back then that there would be a price to shell out one day, just with a delayed payment.” OR After the tip to Vegas, Tommy thinks Eddie owes him.

entry.title: All Day Every Day
entry.summary:
Author: Jessie_emily433

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,848Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 8

Summary: From a onside perspective you would think buck has the perfect life , Tommy the perfect boyfriend , Eddie the best best friend there was , a job he loved and his 9-1-1 family everything seemed perfect until you look under the surface.  Tommy his perfect boyfriend. Actually would beat Buck up every chance he got and buck was stuck. He was Stuck Getting hurt and lying to everybody about it. His only way out had gone and now he felt trapped

entry.title: All Falls Down
entry.summary:
Author: j_marie_archie50

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,031Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Darkness crept further into his vision. “I’m…s-sorry.” Buck let out a quiet sob. “You should’ve just talked to me! Open your damn eyes, Eddie!” Eddie forced his eyes open. “I still–” he swallowed hard, the taste of iron flooding his mouth. “I love you.” “No. No, you don’t get to do this now,” Buck said through gritted teeth. “Not like this.” “Had to tell you…b-before I—” “No! Damn it, Eddie! No!” Buck crawled onto his knees. He cupped Eddie’s face, his hands shaking. “You have to hang on, okay? You can’t leave me again, not like this!”   OR: Eddie breaks up with Buck, thinking he's not good enough for him. A few days later, there's an accident.

entry.title: Like Real People Do
entry.summary:
Author: Hono

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,087Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 33

Summary: Since Eddie left, they’ve been talking non-stop every single day. This unsettling silence doesn’t make any sense – Buck is sure something must’ve happened. Eddie sounded so happy last time they talked because things with his son were finally getting better. There had been a real light in his voice, the kind Buck could recognize even underwater. So, he doesn’t know what might’ve made him vanish into thin air as if he were a ghost. It could be anything, and Buck is scared shitless. It’s a nightmare and Buck can’t seem to wake up from it. Or the one where Buck goes to his best friend's rescue in Texas, and shit happens.

entry.title: You're My Baby, Say It To Me. (I Bet On Losing Dogs)
entry.summary:
Author: Roselover0

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,742Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 101

Summary: After the firetruck incident that left Buck off work with a leg full of metal rods, Buck spent his days with nothing to do and no one to really see. With his friends all working and his day consisting of normal civilian activities, he was lonely. So why not try fostering a kid? This is the story of girl-dad Evan Buckley taking care of a girl who really needs someone. Enjoy!The title is lyrics from "I Bet On Losing Dogs" by MitskiInstagram Account is: https://www.instagram.com/unknown_theys/Spotify Playlist for the fic: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6ktg7bEh1vv9WYH8IGzV69Updates every Thursday

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,260Chapters: 4/365Kudos: 14

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: That Science Teacher
entry.summary:
Author: emmlove14

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,356Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 19

Summary: Buck was startled when he looked back up and saw that his eyes were now open. His eyes were dark chocolaty brown. “Hey you're awake.” the man said, his voice raspy from sleep. “Uh hi?” “Oh sorry I'm Eddie, Eddie Diaz. I'm Chris's Dad. I just wanted to thank you for what you did for him.” “Nice to meet you Eddie.” Buck said feeling his cheeks burn a little. What if Buck was Chris's Science teacher and he keeps meeting Eddie and they start to fall for each other.

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,475Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 76

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,966Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love. The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath. He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt. So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence.It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth. ⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻ My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: It's Just a Number (It's Not Just a Number)
entry.summary:
Author: Bubblezzx88

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 172,172Chapters: 12/18Kudos: 228

Summary: “First, you pack up at the house and don’t tell me, and now you just sneak in here and hope no one sees you?” Eddie asked, hurt. Buck felt himself tense up at the pain he caused his best friend. “It’s tragic, isn’t it? I can’t even face the people who matter to me,” Buck told him. He turned to look at Eddie. Eddie was leaning against the door frame, and Ravi started to walk out. “No, you stay,” Eddie said sternly as he looked at Ravi. Ravi looked between them and didn’t know what to do. He leaned back against the locker. Buck let out a frustrated sigh. “What, now?” Buck asked angrily. “You think that no one wants to say goodbye? You just left the group chat like it was nothing. You gave your transfer request to the interim Captain after Gerrard left, like it was nothing. No one knows how to talk to you, Buck. You just cut everyone off.” Eddie said. But Buck didn’t cut everyone off, no, he just started talking less, he just hoped no one noticed, but of course Eddie did. Eddie always noticed when Buck self-isolated. Or, what happens when Buck moves out, leaves the 118, and ghosts Eddie Diaz?

entry.title: That Boy Is 𝓜𝓘𝓝𝓔
entry.summary:
Author: KiaLecterGraham

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,692Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 491

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley had a normal life. A normal boyfriend (too normal), a normal job, normal parents (whom he hates), and a sister he loves. His whole life seemed normal until he met Eddie Diaz, bringing his son Christopher to the school where Buck works. When their eyes met, Buck knew that Eddie would be his alone. So, Buck started to stalk him without knowing that Eddie wanted him too. OR A story where Buck stalks Eddie Diaz, thinking that he is just a single father with an adorable son whom Buck wants as his own. Not knowing that Eddie is a mafia boss and wants Buck as his spouse and mother of his mijo.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death

entry.title: love is not finite
entry.summary:
Author: nickbonino

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,002Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 269

Summary: I’ve known Buck longer than you’ve been alive. He’s never taken you to the zoo or driven you to school or cooked you your favourite meal from scratch just because you asked. He’s never saved you from a tsunami. He’s never held you through nightmare after nightmare. He’s never come back from the dead because you told him to. He’s never sacrificed himself over and over and over to keep you safe. He’s never loved you like he loves me. Logically, Christopher knows there’s a reason Buck hasn’t done any of these things for Theo. He hasn’t been given the chance to. Yet. or Chris figures out his place in Buck’s life. He just has to yell at a child first.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley & Christopher Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Secrets Beyond the Crash
entry.summary:
Author: EmToGo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,957Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: After Eddie’s car is found wrecked on the side of the road, he disappears without a trace. No body. No clues. No explanation. The investigation begins. Buck can’t stay out of it. Because this wasn’t just an accident... and the truth lies somewhere beyond the mystery.

entry.title: Always been a tug of war —BETWEEN US
entry.summary:
Author: TheQuiceno

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,905Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Buck realizes what he feels for Eddie runs deeper than he ever let himself admit, while Eddie has been drowning in it for years—silently like always. Now everything starts to spiral, putting them in a tug of war making it harder and harder to be together even as they desire each other more and more.

entry.title: the aftermath
entry.summary:
Author: goforeddie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,795Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 155

Summary: “I’m sorry,” Eddie says, putting the glass of water down. He’s shaking, too, Buck can’t help but notice. Buck wants to reach out, but he literally cannot move, and he lets Eddie step away, walking back to his chair and he falls back on it. “Sorry,” he says again, his voice barely a breath. Buck shakes his head, opening his mouth to say something but nothing comes out. What can he say, really? Sorry, Eds, I thought you were my kidnapper standing over me! So he sighs, head going down to his chest and he winces, both from the pain and from bringing that hurt look on his best friend’s face. “I-I got startled,” he says, voice creaking as he speaks. Eddie waves him off, “It’s-It’s okay,” stutters, fidgeting with his fingers. “I got close,” he says, gesturing to him, the bed and the glass of water on the table. A moment of silence passes OR : Buck struggles with the aftermath of the kidnapping.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: 𝑴𝒊𝒏𝒆 - 𝑖𝑚𝑝𝑙𝑖𝑐𝑖𝑡𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦, 𝑒𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑛𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦
entry.summary:
Author: Graceful_Ashes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,450Chapters: 26/28Kudos: 673

Summary: 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑒𝑠 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑡𝑤𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑑, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑥𝑡𝑟𝑖𝑐𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦 𝑠𝑜. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑡𝑟𝑢𝑡ℎ 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑘𝑛𝑜𝑤𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑎𝑚𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑔𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑓𝑎𝑐𝑡 𝑎𝑏𝑜𝑢𝑡 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘’𝑠 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑟𝑒 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑝𝑟𝑒𝑐𝑖𝑝𝑖𝑐𝑒 𝑜𝑓 𝑠𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑚𝑜𝑟𝑒 𝑎𝑛𝑑 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑛𝑜 𝑟𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡𝑜 𝑝𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑚 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑜 𝑢𝑛𝑐ℎ𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑤𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑠. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑙𝑙 𝑓𝑖𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑤𝑎𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑒 𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑢𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑡'𝑠 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑒. 𝑆𝑜 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑐𝑎𝑛 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑒 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑝𝑒𝑜𝑝𝑙𝑒 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑛𝑜𝑤, ℎ𝑒 𝑐𝑎𝑛 ℎ𝑎𝑣𝑒 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑤𝑜𝑛'𝑡 𝑠𝑝𝑜𝑖𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑓𝑜𝑟 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝐼𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑒𝑛𝑑, 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑙𝑤𝑎𝑦𝑠 𝑐𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑜𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝑂𝑟 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡𝑜𝑔𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 ℎ𝑎𝑠 𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑎𝑔𝑎𝑖𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑙𝑖𝑠𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑡𝑎𝑘𝑒𝑠 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑡𝑖𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑔ℎ ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑒𝑒𝑙𝑖𝑛𝑔𝑠 - 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑑 𝑏𝑦 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑'𝑠 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑠.

entry.title: He doesn't warn, He hits
entry.summary:
Author: Tigercher11

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,654Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 51

Summary: A helicopter lifting off a cliff edge. A gun at Grace’s temple.A motorbike launched into freefall.One week earlier, a single word—Buckleberry—signals the return of a man Buck thought he’d survived. As an old enemy resurfaces without warning, Buck’s carefully buried past collides with the life and family he’s built at the 118. With Grace in the crosshairs and danger closing fast, Buck is forced to confront the cost of promises made long ago—and how far he’s willing to go to keep them.Some threats don’t announce themselves.They just hit.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
